title: gladiolus tenuis
intro: Gladiolus tenuis, also known as the narrow-leaved sword lily or narrow-leaved gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus tenuis include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's root is typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
